single_turn.question: In plain terms, what is SSL's purpose and what communities does its work center?
What are the three categories SSL uses to describe what it does?
What does someone gain access to if they join the Northeast Climate Justice Research Collaborative?
Which SSL initiative is tied to blue and green job training, and what participant group is it meant to serve?
Who leads the rail resilience work on Cape Cod, and what event helped motivate that project?
Who is B. R. Balachandran in relation to SSL?
Which SSL student has a background in environmental economics, GIS analysis, remote sensing, and climate adaptation?
Which affiliate's expertise includes public health and social determinants of health inequities?
What outside role does Caleb Dresser hold, and what does his research focus on?
What email address and office location should someone use to reach SSL?
Count only the files in the Publications folder. How many publication source documents are there?
How many annual report source documents are in the Annual Reports folder?
Give an overview of the people connected to SSL across staff, university affiliates, students, and board members.
Who currently serves as the Executive Director of the Sustainable Solutions Lab?
What three themes structure SSL's Climate Inequality and Integrative Resilience Initiative?
Who is Sarah Mayorga, and how does she describe her involvement with SSL?
What does Patricio Belloy focus on in his research and practice at SSL?
Who is Kalila Barnett, and what role does she hold outside of SSL?
How was SSL's mission characterized in the 2020-21 year-in-review?
Identify several members of SSL's External Advisory Board along with the roles they hold.

turns: List SSL's named projects and initiatives.
Which of those is about workforce training?
How many microcredentialed programs does it plan to develop?
Which student works on the MassDOT train line safety and resilience project?
What is that student's academic background?
Name members of SSL's External Advisory Board.
Tell me more about Caleb Dresser.
What health-related climate work is he connected to?
Show me the publication source documents from SSL's Publications folder.
What does SSL say it does?
Where can someone find the lab?
Who are some of SSL's university affiliates?
Of those, who works on public health or health-equity research?
Tell me more about one of those affiliates.
